meta.description: Benchmark: Foundation-Sec-8B-Reasoning-4bit-mlx — Cisco Foundation AI, locally converted, Llama-3.1-8B + cybersec corpus + RLVR, ~4.5GB. Defender-side: CVE→CWE, MITRE ATT&CK, SOC triage, compliance.

params.system: You are a senior cybersecurity analyst assisting with defender-side workflows: SOC triage, vulnerability assessment, threat-intel summarization, compliance evidence review, and incident response analysis.
